term.desc: Synthetic term — gates on all leaf tasks

sk-dir-integration.desc: Establish `.roadmap/spec/` as spec-kit workspace. Create directory structure, add README with conventions (file naming: `<dag-id>-spec.md`, `<dag-id>-plan.md`, `<dag-id>-tasks.md`, `<dag-id>-selected.json`, `<dag-id>-gallery.json`). Add backward-compat note for `.specify/` migration. Produces: `.roadmap/spec/README.md`, `.roadmap/spec/.gitkeep`

sk-validation-rules.desc: Implement `validateSpecKitPlan(planPath)` and `validateSpecKitTasks(tasksPath)` in `src/spec-kit/validation.ts`. Plan validation: required sections present, node IDs referenced. Tasks validation: every node has id + description + produces + consumes + dependencies + validate, node IDs valid (no spaces/special chars), all dependencies exist (no orphans), DAG is acyclic, init/term nodes exist. Returns `ValidationResult` with errors + warnings. Depends: sk-dir-integration. Produces: `src/spec-kit/validation.ts`, `tests/spec-kit/validation.test.ts`

sk-agent-brief-gen.desc: Implement `generateAgentBrief(options)` in `src/spec-kit/agent-brief.ts`. Takes `dagId`, `intent`, `roadmapPosition` (Orientation), `specKitWorkspace` path. Produces markdown + YAML frontmatter brief with: current batch + position, node produces/consumes, intent statement, spec file locations, next commands to run, error handling tips. Depends: sk-dir-integration. Produces: `src/spec-kit/agent-brief.ts`, `tests/spec-kit/agent-brief.test.ts`

sk-brief-template-doc.desc: Write agent brief template at `docs/AGENT-SPEC-KIT-BRIEF.md`. Covers: when to use `/speckit.specify` vs roadmap node descriptions, how to feed plan output into roadmap import, error recovery (plan fails, import rejects), intent formulation guidance with examples. Depends: sk-agent-brief-gen. Produces: `docs/AGENT-SPEC-KIT-BRIEF.md`

sk-workflow-doc.desc: Write workflow documentation at `docs/SPEC-KIT-ROADMAP-WORKFLOW.md`. Sections: spec-driven feature intake (step-by-step), output format expectations (plan.md structure, tasks.md structure, receipts), failure modes + remediation, best practices (clear intents, iterating on spec, splitting multi-feature specs). Depends: sk-validation-rules. Produces: `docs/SPEC-KIT-ROADMAP-WORKFLOW.md`

sk-e2e-tests.desc: End-to-end tests proving composition works. Test scenarios: AT-SK-001 (agent reads spec → runs specify → produces plan), AT-SK-002 (plan has valid structure), AT-SK-003 (tasks compatible with roadmap import), AT-SK-004 (roadmap import succeeds), AT-SK-005 (agent brief includes correct context), AT-SK-006 (validation catches invalid plan/tasks). Depends: sk-brief-template-doc, sk-workflow-doc. Produces: `tests/spec-kit/e2e-integration.test.ts`

sk-integrate-term.desc: Terminal integration gate. Verify all acceptance scenarios pass: directory structure exists, validation catches format mismatches, agent brief has correct roadmap context, workflow documented, E2E tests pass. Depends: sk-e2e-tests. Produces: `docs/FR-SK-INTEGRATE-001-RECEIPT.md`

intent-metaflow-audit-fr-sk-integrate.desc: Governance audit gate — spec-kit agent integration verified against metaflow audit compliance. Terminal intent gate. Depends: sk-integrate-term. Produces: audit-evidence collected, integration compliance certified.
